title: Concurrency Budgets, Backpressure, Rate Limits, and Worker Threads · Spiral Review
summary: A delayed operations handoff reconstructs concurrency budgets, backpressure, rate limits, and worker threads from bounded code and request evidence, challenges one misconception, and revises the admission, concurrency, queue, rate, and CPU-work budget. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for admission, concurrency, queue, rate, and CPU-work budget after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence d…
objectives: Distinguish asynchronous concurrency from parallelism and measure CPU blocking, synchronous I/O, long callbacks, and event-loop delay.
Bound active requests, per-dependency concurrency, queue length, queue age, memory, rejection, Retry-After, and fairness separately.
Apply rate and quota policies to trusted identities, tenant and operation cost, distributed storage, clock behavior, headers, exemptions, and failure mode.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Separate evidence from confidence · Review Overload Recovery Evidence
steps.instruction:
review case — A review team handles case 7211 in a multi-tenant case service with a bounded PostgreSQL pool. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to combine concurrency, queue, tenant-rate, and bounded CPU-offload decisions; prove cleanup before the service deadline expires; then remove one trusted proxy hop and recompute authority from the socket boundary. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Test saturation, noisy neighbors, dependency slowdown, queue shedding, readiness degradation, recovery time, and invariant preservation.

Inspect the Overload Recovery Evidence trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Node and Express server Separate evidence from confidence · Review Overload Recovery Evidence.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for test saturation, noisy neighbors, dependency slowdown, queue shedding, readiness degradation, recovery time, and invariant preservation. For Node and Express server Separate evidence from confidence · Review Overload Recovery Evidence, keep Overload Recovery Evidence connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.

Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. checks.description: The evidence note explains the model, failure risk, and verification in the learner’s own words.
checks.failureMessage: Add a causal explanation using test and saturation plus specific case evidence.
